dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7841 IH: Warrior Infertility Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Morrison (for herself, Mr. Obernolte, Ms. Brownley, Mr. Conaway, and Mr. McGarvey) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to include infertility as a condition presumed to be incurred or aggravated by toxic exposure in the course of active military, naval, air, or space service.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Warrior Infertility Act.

section.header: Infertility as a condition presumed to be incurred or aggravated by toxic exposure
section.text: Section 1120(b) of title 38, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating paragraph (15) as paragraph (16); and
by inserting, after paragraph (14), the following new paragraph (15):
